book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the west
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 5 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called don pasquale pizzeria
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 11:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
